title: schizachyrium sanguineum subvar. schottii
intro: Schizachyrium sanguineum subvar. schottii, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to the prairies of North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Schizachyrium sanguineum subvar. schottii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, fever, and other health ailments.
